mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product, quantity, price, status, create_time FROM orders ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, product, quantity, price, status, create_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, user_id, product, quantity, price, status, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{product}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{status}, #{createTime})
